## Model.FILLING\_VERSION\_ID\_PATTERN variable

Pattern for valid filling version IDs Format: fillingId<!-- -->@<!-- -->versionSpec where fillingId is collectionId.baseFillingId

**Signature:**

```typescript
FILLING_VERSION_ID_PATTERN: RegExp
```
